facilities.title: FCC Family Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
FCC Family Care Centre's Johor Bahru campus in Taman Bukit Tiram, Ulu Tiram, is registered under two entity listings in this directory — one for residential nursing care and this entry, which covers the day care and wider wellness programme operating on the same grounds. Both entities share the same physical site, which FCC markets as Malaysia's first integrated senior living and wellness village, combining nursing care, day care, rehabilitation, and community programming under one campus.

FCC's campus is designed around outdoor engagement: an organic farm with resident participation in planting and harvesting, free-roaming animals on the grounds, healing gardens, and open communal gazebos. A separate MemoryCare sub-home on the campus serves residents with dementia. The operator's website at familycarecentre.co describes the full integrated care model. Day care pricing is not published publicly; the residential arm uses a deposit structure of one month for local residents and three months for foreign residents. Families interested in day care should request a current programme schedule and rate card directly from the facility.

For families in greater Johor Bahru exploring day care or respite options rather than full residential placement, FCC's Ulu Tiram campus offers an outdoor-focused environment and structured daily activities particularly suited to mobile or semi-independent seniors who benefit from social engagement and supervision. The campus is approximately 20 minutes from central JB by car. On your visit, ask about the day programme schedule, transport arrangements for participants, and how a transition to full residential care on the same campus is handled if a participant's needs increase over time.

facilities.title: Haywood Senior Living Medini Johor Bahru
facilities.editorial_summary:
Haywood Senior Living Medini is the first hotel-concept senior living facility in southern Malaysia, embedded within the Ramada by Wyndham Medini hotel complex in Iskandar Puteri, Johor Bahru. Residents occupy remodelled 400-square-foot studio apartments with private balconies, CCTV, in-room call bells, and bathrooms adapted with grab bars and wall-mounted bath chairs. The model is built around privacy and dignity of space — each resident has a self-contained unit rather than an open ward — while still receiving 24-hour caregiver support, on-site nursing, and standby doctor availability. The 5.0-star rating across 40 Google reviews reflects consistently strong family feedback.

Haywood Living describes its care model on the operator website at haywoodliving.co as a hotel-style premium senior living offering. Both the Medini and Bangsar KL branches provide 24/7 nursing care, concierge services, and structured activity programmes. Pricing and room availability are not published on the operator website; deposit terms are also not posted publicly. Enquiry hours are Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm, with walk-in visits by appointment. Families should request a current fee schedule and tour the studio apartment setup during their viewing.

Medini's Iskandar Puteri location is close to Gleneagles Medini Hospital, which is the most accessible private hospital for emergency transfers, and the Second Link makes the site practical for Singapore-based families placing a parent nearby. The hotel-within-a-hotel concept gives residents access to hotel-grade communal spaces alongside specialised eldercare support, distinguishing Haywood from purpose-built nursing homes. On your visit, ask how nursing handovers between day and night shifts are managed, and confirm the pathway if a resident's needs escalate beyond assisted living into high-dependency nursing care.

facilities.title: HAYWOOD SENIOR LIVING @ BANGSAR
facilities.editorial_summary:
Haywood Senior Living Bangsar is the KL flagship of the Haywood Living group, occupying premises at 136 Jalan Ara in Bangsar — one of Kuala Lumpur's best-served neighbourhoods for families who value urban access and proximity to specialist care. Haywood Living positions itself as a hotel-style premium senior living operator, and the Bangsar location offers shared rooms, en-suite single rooms, twin-sharing configurations, and studio units; the absence of a dormitory layout is a consistent differentiator from budget nursing homes in the PJ and KL market. The 4.9-star rating across 45 Google reviews indicates reliable family satisfaction built over time.

Haywood Living's operator website at haywoodliving.co covers the group's shared care model across its Bangsar and Medini branches: 24/7 nursing care, concierge services, and structured activity programming. Room types range from shared to private studio configurations. Pricing and detailed room rates are not published publicly on the website; the current fee schedule and room availability should be requested directly from the Bangsar branch during a viewing appointment.

Bangsar's central KL location places Haywood within easy reach of Pantai Hospital, PPUM (University Malaya Medical Centre), and specialist clinics along the Bangsar corridor — a practically useful catchment for residents who need regular outpatient appointments. For KL families who want a well-reviewed, privacy-focused nursing environment without the commute to outer PJ or Shah Alam, the Bangsar branch warrants a visit. Ask about current room availability, nurse staffing across day and night shifts, and the process for transitioning care if a resident's clinical needs change over time.

facilities.title: Pearl Care Elderly Center Sdn. Bhd.
facilities.editorial_summary:
Pearl Care Elderly Center operates from Seksyen 12, Petaling Jaya, near Jalan Kemajuan — an established residential section with convenient access to the PPUM and Assunta Hospital corridor. The company was incorporated in August 2020 (registration number 1379500H) and is part of a growing multi-branch network that also operates in Seksyen 5 (Bukit Gasing), Section 11, Section 12A, and Sunway Taman Desaria — all within Petaling Jaya. Google Maps categorises the facility under both nursing home and retirement home, indicating a mixed resident profile spanning assisted living through to supervised nursing care.

Pearl Care does not maintain a public-facing operator website, and bed count and pricing are not posted publicly. Based on the group's documented reputation across its PJ network for accepting residents with complex care needs, the clinical scope likely extends beyond basic personal care; whether this includes management of PEG tubes, advanced wound care, or palliative services should be confirmed directly before placement. Monthly fees vary by room type and care level. Families should request a written quote and a walk-through of the care assessment process on their visit.

The 4.9-star average across 16 reviews is high, though the review count is smaller than at the sister Pearl Care Elderly Home branch a short distance away in the same section — making a combined visit to both sites practical in a single trip. When you call, ask for the JKM licence number, confirm which care tiers and resident profiles the facility accepts, and enquire about current occupancy and room configuration before making a placement decision.

facilities.title: Pearl Care Elderly Home
facilities.editorial_summary:
Pearl Care Elderly Home at Jalan 12/16, Seksyen 12, Petaling Jaya, occupies a residential pocket well-positioned for clinical support: University Malaya Medical Centre (PPUM) and Assunta Hospital are both within a manageable drive, covering two of the strongest hospital options in the PJ area for emergency transfers or specialist follow-up. Pearl Care operates as a multi-branch network across PJ — Seksyen 5 Bukit Gasing, Section 11, Sunway Taman Desaria, and Section 12 — and this Section 12 branch carries the largest review base in the network.

Pearl Care Elderly Home has built a documented reputation across the network for accepting residents with higher clinical needs — including those whose care complexity may not qualify them for facilities with a lighter care model. The specific services at this branch — skilled nursing, wound care, dementia management, physiotherapy, palliative care — should be confirmed directly, as no public service list is maintained. Bed count and monthly fees are not published on a public website; families should request a written fee breakdown during their visit.

The 4.6-star rating across 62 reviews is the most substantial review base in the Pearl Care network. Recurring themes in Google reviews point to clinical competence and responsive nursing staff, particularly for residents with complex needs. For families whose relative requires a higher level of clinical care than many PJ nursing homes will accept, Pearl Care Elderly Home is a practical candidate to prioritise. Ask for the JKM licence number when you visit, confirm staffing ratios for nights and weekends, and discuss the process for managing care escalation if medical needs increase.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre PJ
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Centre PJ is the flagship branch of the Genesis Life Care group, occupying a purpose-built space at Lot 1, Petaling Utama Avenue, Jalan PJS 1/50 in Taman Petaling Utama, Petaling Jaya. Established in 2020, the PJ centre is the group's most clinically well-resourced site — with 50-plus beds, a dedicated memory care wing, and a rehabilitation suite staffed by physiotherapists and occupational therapists. The facility holds Ministry of Health approval, and the 4.8-star rating across 22 Google reviews reflects solid early performance for a relatively new centre.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across its Malaysian branches. The published service scope covers 24-hour nursing care, post-stroke rehabilitation, palliative and end-of-life support, respite admissions, and a dedicated memory care programme described by the operator as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities. Physiotherapy and occupational therapy are available on-site at the larger centres, with weekly GP visits as standard. Pricing varies by branch, care level, and room type; fees are not published publicly except at the JB branch, which advertises starting rates from RM 2,500 per month. Families should request a written fee breakdown at assessment.

The Taman Petaling Utama location is convenient for families in the PJ and Subang Jaya corridor, with Assunta Hospital and Sunway Medical Centre within reach for emergency transfers. Among the Genesis branches, PJ offers the deepest clinical infrastructure — the dedicated memory care wing and on-site rehabilitation team make it particularly relevant for residents with dementia or significant post-stroke rehabilitation needs. On your visit, ask about current occupancy, the structure of the psychologist-led memory care programme, and what Ministry of Health approval covers in terms of regulated care oversight.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre Kajang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Kajang is located at 41 Jalan Ria 1 in Kawasan Perindustrian Ria, an industrial park setting off the Cheras-Kajang Highway. The centre opened in 2021 and holds JKM (Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat) registration and AgeCope certification — two of the formal credentials sought by families and medical social workers evaluating private nursing homes in Malaysia. The industrial-park location trades scenic surroundings for practical vehicle access from Cheras, Bangi, Kajang town, and the SILK Highway. The 4.9-star rating across 37 reviews is the highest in the Genesis chain, suggesting consistent family satisfaction over the three years since opening.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across its Malaysian branches. The published service scope covers 24-hour nursing care, post-stroke rehabilitation, palliative and end-of-life support, respite admissions, and a dedicated memory care programme described by the operator as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities. Physiotherapy and occupational therapy are available on-site at the larger centres, with weekly GP visits as standard. Pricing varies by branch, care level, and room type; fees are not published publicly except at the JB branch, which advertises starting rates from RM 2,500 per month. Families should request a written fee breakdown at assessment.

Genesis Kajang is a practical option for families based across the southern Klang Valley — Cheras, Seri Kembangan, Bangi, and Kajang are all within reasonable driving distance. Columbia Asia Hospital Cheras and Hospital Kajang are the nearest large hospitals for acute referrals. When visiting, ask about current bed availability, the overnight nursing team, and how the AgeCope certification translates into the day-to-day care and oversight structure for individual residents.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre Klang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Centre Klang is the founding branch of the Genesis Life Care group, established in 2018 at No. 3, Jalan Istana, Amverton Business Centre, 41000 Klang. The Klang location is close to Tengku Ampuan Rahimah (TAR) Hospital — the main government referral hospital for Klang — a practically useful proximity for residents requiring specialist follow-up or emergency care. At 71 reviews, Klang is the most-reviewed branch in the Genesis chain; the 4.3-star average reflects honest long-run feedback across six years of operation.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across its Malaysian branches. The published service scope covers 24-hour nursing care, post-stroke rehabilitation, palliative and end-of-life support, respite admissions, and a dedicated memory care programme described by the operator as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities. Physiotherapy and occupational therapy are available on-site at the larger centres, with weekly GP visits as standard. Pricing varies by branch, care level, and room type; fees are not published publicly except at the JB branch, which advertises starting rates from RM 2,500 per month. Families should request a written fee breakdown at assessment.

Klang's status as the founding branch means it has the longest operational history and the most established community reputation in the Genesis group. Families based in Klang town, Shah Alam, and Meru will find the location practical. The 4.3-star rating — lower than the group's other branches — warrants reading recent Google reviews before visiting to assess current performance. On your visit, ask about occupancy, night-shift staffing ratios, and how the rehabilitation programme is structured for residents with specific post-stroke or post-surgical recovery goals.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre JB
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care JB is the most recently opened branch of the Genesis Life Care group, launched in April 2025 at Level 6, Holiday Plaza Tower, Jalan Dato Sulaiman in Taman Century, Johor Bahru. The tower-based format — converting commercial floor space rather than a landed compound — is a different physical model from the Klang Valley branches. The operator states the JB centre has 120-plus beds and a 20-plus-strong care team; both are operator-stated figures. The 4.4-star rating across 14 reviews reflects early feedback from a facility that opened less than a year before this listing's last update.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across its Malaysian branches. The published service scope covers 24-hour nursing care, post-stroke rehabilitation, palliative and end-of-life support, respite admissions, and a dedicated memory care programme described by the operator as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities. Physiotherapy and occupational therapy are available on-site at the larger centres, with weekly GP visits as standard. Pricing varies by branch, care level, and room type; fees are not published publicly except at the JB branch, which advertises starting rates from RM 2,500 per month. Families should request a written fee breakdown at assessment.

Genesis JB's Taman Century address is centrally located in Johor Bahru, with Columbia Asia Hospital Bukit Indah and Pantai Hospital Johor accessible for acute transfers. For families in JB seeking a group with formal JKM licensure and AgeCope certification, Genesis JB provides those credentials in a central urban setting. Given the facility's recent opening, ask on your visit how key clinical staff were recruited, whether any senior team members transferred from the group's Klang Valley branches, and request a full tour of the Level 6 floor layout before finalising a placement.

facilities.title: Attia Nursing Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
Attia Nursing Care Centre is a branch of the Attia Care Centres group, which has been providing nursing care across the Klang Valley and Ipoh since 2011. This listing corresponds to the group's Taman Wahyu location at Jalan Sibu 13, off Jalan Ipoh in northern Kuala Lumpur; note that the state field in this directory shows Selangor, but the address is within the Kuala Lumpur municipality — families should confirm the exact address and branch status when calling. This branch operates under the original Attia Nursing Care branding, distinct from the Attia Global Care branded locations in Klang and Subang Jaya.

Attia Care's nursing homes have operated since 2011 with a clinical focus on medically complex residents — including those recovering from stroke, coma, head injury, post-operative cancer, orthopaedic surgery, and amputation. The Klang and Subang Jaya branches offer Halal-certified meals and Islamic activities as part of the daily programme, catering specifically to Muslim elderly. Bed count and pricing are not published publicly at any Attia branch; families should request a written quote and care assessment during their visit.

No Google reviews are recorded for this listing, so community feedback is not available to supplement the directory information. Bed count and pricing are not published publicly. Families interested in the Attia Care network are recommended to contact the group directly to confirm which branches are currently accepting admissions, and to get current fee information. When you call, ask for the JKM licence number for this specific branch, verify the operating address, and confirm the clinical scope available for residents with complex nursing needs.

facilities.title: Attia Global Care Klang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Attia Global Care Klang is the flagship and most-reviewed branch of the Attia Care Centres group, located at Jalan Raja Bot in the central commercial district of Klang, 41400 Klang. The Klang branch is the larger and more established of the two Attia Global Care sites in Selangor, and is consistently rated among the better-reviewed nursing homes in Klang town. The 4.7-star average across 77 Google reviews is built over several years of family experience, making it one of the higher-review-count facilities in the Klang nursing home market.

Attia Care's nursing homes have operated since 2011 with a clinical focus on medically complex residents — including those recovering from stroke, coma, head injury, post-operative cancer, orthopaedic surgery, and amputation. The Klang and Subang Jaya branches offer Halal-certified meals and Islamic activities as part of the daily programme, catering specifically to Muslim elderly. Bed count and pricing are not published publicly at any Attia branch; families should request a written quote and care assessment during their visit.

Tengku Ampuan Rahimah (TAR) Hospital is the nearest large government hospital for emergency transfers from the Klang branch, and Pantai Hospital Klang is the nearest private option. For families in Klang, Shah Alam, and Meru who are specifically seeking a Halal-certified, Muslim-oriented care environment with a documented track record in medically complex cases, Attia Global Care Klang is a strong candidate. On your visit, confirm bed availability, how nursing staff manage complex clinical needs overnight, and request a care assessment to understand the fee structure for your family member's specific care level.

facilities.title: Attia Global Care Centre Subang Jaya
facilities.editorial_summary:
Attia Global Care Centre Subang Jaya is the second Selangor branch of the Attia Care Centres group, located at No. 7, Jalan SS 19/2 in the established SS19 neighbourhood of Subang Jaya. The facility is described in operator materials as having a homely rather than clinical character — air-conditioned rooms with attached bathrooms, a large communal living area, lift access for wheelchair users, and nurse call systems. The 4.5-star rating across 24 Google reviews points to solid family satisfaction, and the SS19 location is practical for families based across Subang Jaya and Shah Alam.

Attia Care's nursing homes have operated since 2011 with a clinical focus on medically complex residents — including those recovering from stroke, coma, head injury, post-operative cancer, orthopaedic surgery, and amputation. The Klang and Subang Jaya branches offer Halal-certified meals and Islamic activities as part of the daily programme, catering specifically to Muslim elderly. Bed count and pricing are not published publicly at any Attia branch; families should request a written quote and care assessment during their visit.

Sunway Medical Centre is the nearest large private hospital for emergency transfers from Subang Jaya, and Hospital Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia (HUKM) is accessible for specialist referrals. For families in the Subang Jaya area seeking a Halal-certified, Muslim-oriented nursing home with a more residential feel, Attia Global Care Subang Jaya warrants a visit. On your viewing, confirm bed availability, how the clinical complexity of residents compares to the Klang flagship, and request a written fee breakdown based on your family member's assessed care needs.
